'''Torm''' was one of four continents on the planet of [[Lazerian IV]].

==Description==
It was located on the planet's western hemisphere and contained the city of [[Tormaine]].<ref name="LIV" /> The terrain was mostly made up of plains, with forests covering the middle part, while the southern end had large mountains.<ref name="PLTK" /> Together with [[Elgar]] and [[Laz]], it made up the [[Kingdom of Devit]].<ref name="LIV" />
